title_en: DOOM + DOOM II (2024 Nightdive Kex Edition)
sales_world: Steam owners 500K-1M; free upgrade for previous Doom (2019) port owners
popularity: Bundled Kex-engine port of the 1993/1994 originals with new Legacy of Rust episode by id+Nightdive+MachineGames — the canonical modern Doom classic release.
